description: Composition Black crew neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, fabric tape lining on the inside of the neck, and print on the chest with a brand tab above the hemline on the left Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Take the cue of being stylish from lee and make your own path for others to follow. lee owes a lot to its growth to Kansas City for giving it that platform to set shop and grow into a worldwide favourite brand. This cotton t-shirt from Lee pays tribute to the city of Kansas with its stylish chest print. So if you are that true Lee fan, don this tee and join your favourite brand in thanking the city of its origin. Team this T-shirt with jeans and sports shoes or sandals for that cool, casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
